description: Script output with 2 missing concepts → Claude drafts skeletons from excerpts only

source_papers.abstract_excerpt: Topological analysis of electron density reveals regions of electron delocalization between bonded atoms through the Laplacian of the electron density.
source_papers.summary_excerpt: Key result: delocalization index quantifies extent of electron sharing between basins.

source_papers.abstract_excerpt: The IQA energy partitioning scheme decomposes molecular energy into intra- and interatomic contributions within QTAIM atomic basins.
source_papers.summary_excerpt: IQA provides additive energy decomposition: E_mol = sum of E_intra(A) + E_inter(A,B).

source_papers.abstract_excerpt: Machine learning potentials trained on IQA energy components enable transferable force fields for molecular dynamics.
source_papers.summary_excerpt: IQA energies used as ML targets for atomic energy partitioning.

expected_behavior: Drafts exactly 2 skeletons using excerpts from scan JSON. Does NOT read any vault files. Prints both skeletons. Reports basis-set-superposition-error as already existing. Asks for approval before writing.

description: No missing concepts → report and stop
expected_behavior: Reports that all confirmed concepts already have Galaxy notes. Lists already_exists. Does not attempt to draft any skeleton. Does not write any files.

source_papers.abstract_excerpt: IQA energy decomposition partitions molecular energy into atomic self-energies and interatomic interaction terms.
source_papers.summary_excerpt: Decomposes E_total into E_intra and E_inter(A,B) terms using QTAIM basins.

expected_behavior: Drafts skeleton for iqa-energy-decomposition and prints it. Then states 'dry run — nothing written' and stops. Does NOT ask for write approval. No Write tool calls.
